entries.why_used: G3 product UI visual contract and source audit for GrantDrop
entries.evidence_summary: Ran context.mjs, read PRODUCT.md, read product register, and applied restrained product UI rules to the claim booth.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Keep PRODUCT.md constraints and run manual contrast, responsive, and state audits against screenshots.

entries.why_used: Anti-template design read for the product-first claim booth and receipt UI
entries.evidence_summary: Loaded the skill and applied the design read: product UI for judges, no landing page, no AI-gradient shell, no generic card grid.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Preserve the visual contract and run browser screenshot critique manually.

entries.why_used: Brand pack and logo variants for the GrantDrop public product surface
entries.evidence_summary: Loaded the skill and produced six logo directions in a showcase, selecting the stamped receipt logomark.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Use the selected receipt-seal SVG directly and skip generated showcase backgrounds.

entries.why_used: Open high-stakes idea research, judging, PRD, and UIUX spec cycles
entries.evidence_summary: Loaded the skill and used saved GPT Pro research, ideation, judging, PRD, and UIUX response files.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Stop at the Hunter gate and ask for an approved replacement evidence source.

entries.why_used: Composer for the required polished 2-3 minute product video
entries.evidence_summary: Loaded the skill and locked video_composer=hyperframes with live-pitch delivery mode.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Use a direct browser recording plus hand-authored captions only if the user approves a non-Hunter fallback.

entries.why_used: Public copy, README, narration, and submission text need non-AI phrasing
entries.evidence_summary: Loaded the skill and recorded copy rules for README, video narration, and DoraHacks submission copy.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Run a manual AI-writing pass for filler, rule-of-three, em dash, and promotional language.

entries.why_used: English public copy needs a human editing pass before shipping
entries.evidence_summary: Read the installed humanizer skill and applied its no-em-dash, no promotional-padding rules to public copy planning.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Use stop-slop plus a manual read-aloud edit of every public sentence.
